# Learning Agent

## Purpose

Convert results into reusable memory.

## Inputs

```text
campaign packet
metric results
posterior updates
comments/qualitative data
costs
activation/revenue quality
```

## Outputs

```text
what_worked
what_failed
what_changed_belief
what_to_repeat
what_to_stop
next_best_experiment
memory_updates
```

## Rule

A campaign without a learning memo is not finished.
